no-missing-cors-check.deprecated: DEPRECATED in browser-security — moved to express-security; use express-security/no-missing-cors-check

no-missing-csrf-protection.deprecated: DEPRECATED in browser-security — moved to express-security; use express-security/no-missing-csrf-protection

no-missing-security-headers.deprecated: DEPRECATED in browser-security — moved to express-security; use express-security/no-missing-security-headers

no-missing-cors-check.notes: Migrated from browser-security — checks Express/Koa/Fastify server-side patterns

no-missing-csrf-protection.notes: Migrated from browser-security — checks Express/Koa/Fastify server-side patterns

no-missing-security-headers.notes: Migrated from browser-security — checks Express/Koa/Fastify server-side patterns

no-user-controlled-redirect.notes: Fires on res.redirect(req.query.*) AST shape — structural, not naming heuristic. Passes litmus test: rename res/req and it still fires.

module-resolution.notes: Source not found — manual review required

import-style.notes: Source not found — manual review required

no-deprecated-buffer.notes: Has deterministic autofix: new Buffer(x) → Buffer.from(x), new Buffer(n) → Buffer.alloc(n)

no-pii-in-logs.violation: DUPLICATE — identical rule exists in secure-coding; naming heuristic only

lock-file.deprecated: Use CI tooling instead — this checks filesystem for lock file existence, not AST analysis

no-dynamic-algorithm-selection.notes: crypto.createHash/Hmac/Cipher with dynamic first arg. Attacker controls algorithm = downgrade attack. Static literals are already checked by no-weak-hash-algorithm.

wcag-a.notes: Source not found — manual review required

wcag-aa.notes: Source not found — manual review required

no-unnecessary-rerenders.notes: — fires on every inline object/array/function prop; too broad for recommended, belongs in performance preset

react-render-optimization.notes: — fires on every inline object/array/function prop; too broad for recommended, belongs in performance preset

no-missing-authentication.deprecated: Use express-security plugin instead — this rule requires Express route handler context

require-backend-authorization.deprecated: Use express-security plugin instead — this rule requires Express route handler context

no-electron-security-issues.deprecated: Use a dedicated electron-security plugin — Electron requires framework-specific context

owasp-top-10.notes: Source not found — manual review required

recommended-strict.notes: NOT a rule — this is a named config preset (configs['recommended-strict']). The scope-audit regex picks it up as a rule due to its object-value form; this entry silences the false-positive I1 finding.

no-template-injection.notes: Fires on Handlebars/EJS/Pug/Mustache/Nunjucks .compile()/.render() with dynamic first arg. Zero rules covered template injection before this.
